reasoning_content: I need to add support for hex and octal constants. Let me update the SYsULexer.g4 file to add hex constant support.

action.old_str:
Constant
    :   IntegerConstant
    ;

fragment
IntegerConstant
    :   DecimalConstant
    |   OctalConstant
    ;

fragment
DecimalConstant
    :   NonzeroDigit Digit*
    ;

fragment
OctalConstant
    :   '0' OctalDigit*
    ;


fragment
NonzeroDigit
    :   [1-9]
    ;

fragment
OctalDigit
action.new_str:
Constant
    :   IntegerConstant
    ;

fragment
IntegerConstant
    :   DecimalConstant
    |   OctalConstant
    |   HexConstant
    ;

fragment
DecimalConstant
    :   NonzeroDigit Digit*
    ;

fragment
OctalConstant
    :   '0' OctalDigit*
    ;

fragment
HexConstant
    :   '0' [xX] HexDigit+
    ;

fragment
HexDigit
    :   [0-9a-fA-F]
    ;


fragment
NonzeroDigit
    :   [1-9]
    ;

fragment
OctalDigit
